use_cases: Display category or status labels on content items
Show count badges on navigation items or cards
Highlight important information with color-coded variants
Tag content for filtering or organization
Indicate destructive actions with destructive variant
ai_summary: A reusable Badge component with CVA-based variants for displaying labels, tags, or status indicators. Supports default, secondary, destructive, and outline visual styles with hover state transitions. Commonly used in dashboards, cards, and navigation patterns for categorizing content.
